_metadata.description: Non-standardized whole herb powders and simple botanical extracts without guaranteed marker compounds. Used for basic ingredient mapping. For premium standardized extracts with marker compounds, see standardized_botanicals.json.
_metadata.notes: This database is separate from standardized_botanicals.json by design. Overlaps are intentional and allow the scoring system to reward standardized forms over raw powders.
